BOTH SIDES REST. JURY DELIBERATES AND RETURNS WITH A VERDICT FOR THE PLTF. ALL EXHIBITS ARE W/D. PLTF TO PREP JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MITCHELL, ROBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 387 ELLIS ST. #308 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102. $1,676.28 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,676.28, LEASE FORFEITED, THIS JUDGMENT IS BASED ON A JURY VERDICT IN FAVOR OF PLTF & AGAINST DEFT.
